Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Who are the saintly politicians[rajarsis]who will fullfill Srila Prabhupadas dream?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-10-12 · 4 answers
1. By looking only in his books[unedited] for guidance.
2. By taking the necessary steps,with those willing, to carry on his instructions.
3. By uprooting all negative elements from the Society.
user [2] · 2007-10-13
Sounds like ksatriyas coming to the rescue.... :)
But ksatriyas and brahmanas are somehow banned from our society in my view.
Mostly vaishyas and shudras are proliferating.
And vaishyas want to employ everyone in their "business". See wages for sages. Problem is, that does not work with real sages.
user [179] · 2007-10-15
who are the rajrsis who are to fulfill Srila Prabhup'e4da'b4s Dream ?

Srila Prabhupada'b4s dream is (GOD'b4s) Krsna'b4s dream, those saint rajrsis are taken into account into many rosaries of which these, the Vaisnav philosophy is really found of, because they will be threaded and at that same time Srila'b4s Dream will be fulfilled i assure to be a last Lord Krsna Caitanya'b4s premonition.

that we are ONE in the eyes of every-single-one over this one sole planet.

Krsna - He is one and all. he is the perfect son, "Like Father Like Son" and fathers us all, but we do not accept that.. we take krsna as our object for everything, do you know why ppl not seen him alike, just as a child ?

well it is not the matter actually, the matter is where are these the vijay-mala souls, the rudra-mala souls, and the entire 16,108 close associates of that supreme personality of Godhead acting ?. that we can influesiate them all with our thoughts..

thank you very much.
Hare Krsna.
user [343] · 2010-12-23
Lets face it and be truthful and honest, Iskcon is whats left of Srila Prabhupadas dream. For all its best intentions, Iskcon a dysfunctional society that still after 40-50 years makes most of its money from having collectors take to the streets and telling blatent lies (we are collecting for the starving children of India), we all know this but we put it in the box that says "The End Justifies The Means" that has not worked for me since the early 80s, if Iskcon cannot be 100% honest then it is better to live like beggars and if only a handful of real devotees are left if they are real true vaisnavas then at least we have truth, simplicity and honesty.

Are there still people around with the insane idea that somehow or other Iskcon will revive Varnashrama society? or take over the world? Iskcon cannot even keep its own house in good order. Sri Chaitanya wasted no time on these affairs he knew it was the very Varnashram system of thought that deteriorated into the class/caste system. He challenged that system and embraced the lower classes.

Its time to be simple and humble and follow Sri Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, he is the figure of this age, Sri Chaitanya was very Christ like in that he embraced the untouchables and displayed very deep spiritual sentiments, he accepted all and sundary. The more fallen they were, the more qualified they were. He conquered all by pure love. He chastised the incumbent caste system and his life was a living example. I did not see Sri Chaitanya try and take over the physical world.

Sri Chaitanya is the yuga avatar it is in he we shall find the best examples and the direction forward. Building cities of Dwarka and trying to re-instate a class based system is not for this age, this was not the mood of Sri Chaitanya Mahaprabhu.
user [366] · 2010-12-25
Theyll manifest themselves on their own.
